prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Since we last spoke, some big things have happened. Last week I went to an LGBTQ+ pride parade. Everyone was so happy and it made me feel like I belonged. It showed me how much our community has grown, it was amazing!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline, sounds like the parade was an awesome experience! It's great to see the love and support for the LGBTQ+ community. Congrats! Has this experience influenced your goals at all?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks, Mel! It really motivated me for sure. Talking to the community made me want to use my story to help others too - I'm still thinking that counseling and mental health is the way to go. I'm super excited to give back. "
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Wow, Caroline! That's great! I just signed up for a pottery class yesterday. It's like therapy for me, letting me express myself and get creative. Have you found any activities that make you feel the same way?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Melanie! I'm getting creative too, just learning the piano. What made you try pottery?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "I'm a big fan of pottery - the creativity and skill is awesome. Plus, making it is so calming. Look at this!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "That bowl is gorgeous! The black and white design looks so fancy. Did you make it?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Yeah, I made this bowl in my class. It took some work, but I'm pretty proud of it."
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Nice job! You really put in the work and it definitely shows. Your creativity looks great!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! Your kind words mean a lot. Pottery is a huge part of my life, not just a hobby - it helps me express my emotions. Clay is incredible, it brings me so much joy!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Wow, Mel, I'm so stoked for you that art is helping you express yourself and bring you joy! Keep it up!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Thanks, Caroline! I'm excited to see where pottery takes me. Anything coming up you're looking forward to?"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Thanks Mel! I'm going to a transgender conference this month. I'm so excited to meet other people in the community and learn more about advocacy. It's gonna be great!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Sounds awesome, Caroline! Have a great time and learn a lot. Have fun!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Caroline said: "Cool, thanks Mel! Can't wait. I'll keep ya posted. Bye!"
[1:36 pm on 3 July, 2023] Melanie said: "Bye, Caroline! Can't wait to hear about it. Have fun and stay safe!""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
